summary:
E2E validation of the NEW section-based PostEditor UX (Обложка / Описание / Фотографии / Видео) with drag-drop dropzones. Backend pytest: 29/29 pass (including a NEW TestCoverOrdering that uploads 3 photos, marks one is_cover=true in a non-first position, POSTs to /api/posts and verifies the resulting Telegraph article renders the cover image BEFORE the other two photos). Frontend Playwright: login → /new → verified 4 sections+dropzones present → uploaded cover via cover-file-input (dropzone replaced by + cover-remove) → uploaded 2 photos via photos-file-input (2 photo-item-* thumbnails with caption inputs) → uploaded 1 mp4 via videos-file-input (video-item-* rendered, dropzone still shown for more) → filled editor-title + editor-description → editor-save → navigated back to dashboard → new row visible → open-link- href is telegra.ph → article body inspection:
contains 3 tags and cover appears BEFORE the description paragraph (first_img=89, desc_pos=201 inside
). Test post deleted at end.
critical_code_review_comments: PostEditor.jsx Dropzone: click-anywhere-on-dropzone triggers hidden input.click(); works but also fires when clicking removal button area on other sections due to event bubbling? Not observed as a bug, but consider e.stopPropagation on inner buttons.

PostEditor.jsx uploadOne sends multipart with axios; if user selects a very large file the API will 413 silently on ingress. Consider client-side size cap / progress indicator (currently only spinner).

PostEditor.jsx: when saving, video blocks without url are filtered but if a video is still uploading save() shows 'Дождитесь загрузки медиа' toast (good). However cover.uploading is checked via anyUploading — verified fine.

server.py POST /upload: reads full UploadFile into memory (await file.read()) then writes to GridFS — fine for small files, but no streaming for large videos. Consider bucket.upload_from_stream(fileobj=file.file) with chunking for prod.
Dashboard.jsx delete uses no confirm dialog — a misclick on 🗑 will silently delete a post. Consider a confirm() or shadcn AlertDialog for safety.
server.py still uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('startup') (carried over from iter 2). Migrate to lifespan.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all editor sections, uploads, save, cover-first-in-article verified)

seed_data_creation: 1 test post 'TEST_ UI E2E cover multi photos' created via UI (cover + 2 photos + 1 video + description) and deleted at end via API. 1 test post 'TEST_ cover ordering' created and deleted inside pytest TestCoverOrdering. 1 test post 'TEST_ pytest article' created and deleted inside pytest TestFullFlow. All GridFS media auto-deleted with their parent posts. Confirmed no residual TEST_ posts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The new PostEditor uses 4 sections with Dropzone components; hidden file inputs are exposed via data-testid: cover-file-input (single), photos-file-input (multiple), videos-file-input (multiple). Playwright cannot do real OS drag-drop into these but page.set_input_files works. Note: Telegraph rendered HTML wraps its <meta name=description> content from the first text block near the top of <head>; when asserting 'cover image first', scope your search to the inner <article> tag, NOT the whole HTML (naive full-page position check will incorrectly place description before images). Cover ordering is enforced server-side in server.py POST /api/posts (cover_idx move-to-front). Dashboard delete testid is `delete-${id}` (not `delete-post-${id}` — a small note if writing new tests).
